@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
P: widen_window ∧ add_skew_buffer ∧ min_fix
V: valid_webhook_passes ∧ stale_still_"401" ∧ reg_test
A: bump_tolerance ∧ clamp_skew ∧ unit_test_boundary

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Plan: widen_window and add_skew_buffer and min_fix.
Verify: valid_webhook_passes and stale_still_"401" and reg_test.
Answer target: bump_tolerance and clamp_skew and unit_test_boundary.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_overdue_402
C: middleware_billing ∧ overdue⇒402 ∧ grace("24h") ∧ boundary_loop
P: check_overdue ∧ age<"24h"⇒pass ∧ age>="24h"⇒"402" ∧ half_open_interval
V: no_charge_loop ∧ exact_24h_boundary ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test
A: patch_guard ∧ test("24h-1s") ∧ test("24h") ∧ test("24h+1s")

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_overdue_402.
Constraints: middleware_billing and overdue implies 402 and grace("24h") and boundary_loop.
Plan: check_overdue and age<"24h" implies pass and age>="24h" implies "402" and half_open_interval.
Verify: no_charge_loop and exact_24h_boundary and min_fix and reg_test.
Answer target: patch_guard and test("24h-1s") and test("24h") and test("24h+1s").

@sigil v0 hybrid

V: one_deploy ∧ low_ops_load ∧ audit_boundaries ∧ split_later
A: ship_monolith ∧ enforce_modules ∧ defer_microservices

@sigil v0 hybrid

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ same_order
P: async_fn ∧ await_calls ∧ try_catch_next_err
V: order_preserved ∧ minimal_change ∧ behavior_same
A: rewrite_reconcileBatch ∧ async_await ∧ "next(err)"_on_db_err

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: has("async") ∧ has("await") ∧ has("next(err)") ∧ same_order
P: convert_to_async ∧ await_calls ∧ minimal_change
V: order(session_check>db.findUser>flags.load>audit.log>next) ∧ db_err="next(err)" ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: async_await ∧ try_catch_next_err ∧ no_logic_change
